= Comment Handling Test

This document tests that content in comments is properly ignored.

[[valid-anchor]]
== Valid Section

This anchor should be found.

////
This is a block comment that should be completely ignored.
All content here should not be processed:

[[ignored-anchor]]
Reference to ignored: <<ignored-anchor>>
Ignored URL: https://ignored-url-in-block-comment.com
link:https://ignored-link-macro.com[Ignored Link]
xref:ignored-xref[Ignored XRef]
////

// This is a single line comment: <<ignored-ref>> https://ignored-line-comment.com

Valid reference: <<valid-anchor>>

// Another comment line with anchor: [[ignored-line-anchor]]

Valid URL: https://github.com
Broken URL for testing: https://broken-url-for-comment-test.com

////
Another block comment with various content:
anchor:ignored-macro[Ignored Macro]
[#ignored-inline]
Text with ignored reference <<valid-anchor, but this ref should be ignored>>
Multiple ignored URLs:
- https://first-ignored.com
- https://second-ignored.com
////

Final valid reference: <<valid-anchor, Valid Reference Text>>
